title: <div>It’s fine to send out a mass FB post, but we also need to hit up individual
content:
It’s fine to send out a mass FB post, but we also need to hit up individual friends whose tastes align with whatever track from our eclectic album, and send them these links directly and get them to listen. The first ten days of Spotify are super important. Beg them to add one of our tracks to their Playlist.

Get Lyrics up on Youtube, Genius, and Bandcamp.
